description_long: This is a large, industrial-style searchlight lamp mounted on a robust circular base with four extended stabilizing legs. The lamp features a prominent, transparent front lens with a bold, black Bat symbol at its center, reminiscent of the iconic Bat-Signal from the Batman franchise. The cylindrical lamp housing is supported by two heavy-duty side brackets, allowing for vertical tilting adjustment. The structure is predominantly black with metallic accents, giving it a sleek, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban rooftops or public spaces. The rear of the lamp is solid and opaque, with visible paneling and mechanical details. The overall design is both functional and highly decorative, serving as a dramatic focal point in any urban environment.
description: A large, black industrial searchlight with a transparent front lens displaying a Bat symbol, mounted on a sturdy circular base with four legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent lens with the Bat symbol and the detailed mounting structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical lamp housing, side brackets, and the depth of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, opaque back of the lamp and the mechanical paneling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side bracket and the lamp's robust mounting mechanism.
